hero.description: Contract frontend web developer with more than ten years shipping client facing pages in HTML, CSS, and client side JavaScript for B2B sites and interactive web properties. I write semantic markup, responsive layouts, and maintainable vanilla JavaScript that coordinates with backend teams and external APIs. Remote collaboration through Discord, shared boards, and Git workflows. Principal, Your Website In 7 Days LLC. Available immediately for remote contract work with direct billing to the LLC.

highlights.label: HTML, CSS, client side JavaScript, semantic markup, responsive web design, DOM manipulation, fetch API, CSS custom properties, flexbox, grid, Git, Discord, Trello, GitLab, backend coordination, static site delivery, UI implementation, B2B web properties, remote contract delivery

items.title: Frontend Developer and Principal
items.organization: Your Website In 7 Days LLC, remote contract
bullets: Built and maintain a production portfolio platform in semantic HTML, CSS, and vanilla JavaScript with responsive layout, theme switching, and a gated access flow tied to serverless backend endpoints.
Implemented profile loading, session aware navigation, form validation, and async fetch patterns that keep the UI stable while API calls resolve.
Own the frontend build pipeline including HTML, CSS, and JavaScript minification and deployment packaging for production.

items.title: Contract Frontend Web Developer
bullets: Coded homepage, interior page, and landing templates in HTML and CSS with JavaScript for navigation, modals, and interactive sections.
Delivered responsive breakpoints and component CSS so pages hold up on desktop and mobile without rework from backend teams.
Coordinated scope, reviews, and handoffs through Discord and Trello with client stakeholders and development partners.

items.title: Frontend and Web Experience Specialist
items.organization: Regulated life and health reinsurance, remote contract
bullets: Implemented frontend portions of web and dashboard experiences for actuarial, finance, and executive audiences with readable hierarchy and consistent UI patterns.
Partnered with developers on HTML structure, CSS standards, and client side behavior for reporting views released to production.

groups.title: Frontend
items: HTML, CSS, client side JavaScript, responsive web design, DOM APIs, fetch and async UI, CSS variables, flexbox, grid

groups.title: Tools
items: Git, Discord, Trello, GitLab, VS Code, browser devtools, static site build scripts
